name: curator-agent
description: Curator — autonomous regulatory-change intelligence for Indian BFSI. Compares two regulatory documents, surfaces obligations + missing-coverage gaps + impact through a four-stakeholder-lens debate panel.

skills.name: Decompose (4-lens debate panel)
skills.description: Break each amended regulatory clause into atomic obligations. Four parallel stakeholder lenses (banker, compliance officer, auditor, customer-protection) debate; a Reconciler merges; a Reflector triggers Spanner Graph re-query on low-confidence cases.
examples: Decompose section 11.5A of the second-amendment circular into atomic obligations.

skills.name: Map obligations to internal policies
skills.description: Match each obligation against the bank's existing policies and SOPs. Coverage is one of: full / partial / missing / stale / contradicts. Parallelized across obligations via ThreadPoolExecutor.
examples: Map the 22 obligations from the latest run against the bank's policy corpus.

skills.name: Generate suggested policy edits
skills.description: Produce concrete proposed edits with rationale for each obligation that is missing, partial, or stale. Proposals only — never auto-applied. Parallelized.
examples: Draft the policy edits needed to close the 9 missing-coverage gaps.

skills.name: Judge (4-critic impact panel)
skills.description: Score impact and priority; surface non-obvious downstream effects (capital plan, ICAAP, Pillar-3, RMC reporting). Four parallel critics (impact, ICAAP, Pillar-3, ops-risk) debate; Reconciler merges into a single ImpactSummary.
examples: Judge the impact of the second-amendment circular for a mid-cap commercial bank.

skills.name: Q&A over the analysis (optional A2A enrichment)
skills.description: Answer follow-up questions about the completed analysis with citations to obligation ids and policy section ids. When BBB_MCP_BEARER is set, also enriches with cited snippets from an external regulatory-corpus A2A gateway.
examples: What is the priority of this amendment and which board committee should review it first?

skills.name: Reflector (low-confidence re-query)
skills.description: Reviews reconciled panel output; on low aggregate confidence or non-empty missing-evidence cues, queries Spanner Graph neighborhood (depth 2) for additional context. Falls back to A2A bridge when Spanner returns empty and the external bridge is enabled.
examples: Triage why obligation obl-c12-0 came back with confidence 0.42.
